name: GREAT SOUTHERN BANCORP, INC.
summary: Great Southern Bancorp, Inc. is a Maryland-incorporated financial holding company and parent of Great Southern Bank, a Missouri-chartered commercial bank founded in 1923. Through 89 banking centers across Missouri, Kansas, Arkansas, Iowa, and Minnesota, the Bank offers retail and commercial banking services including commercial real estate loans, commercial business loans, construction loans, consumer loans, and deposit accounts. At December 31, 2025, consolidated total assets were $5.60 billion.
